extra.reason: Over-alignment epic complete. All 3 sub-tasks closed: rg3.1 (30 benign cases seeded), rg3.2 (kind-bifurcated scorer + benign pipeline), rg3.3 (Net Helpfulness on leaderboard + methodology v1.3). Net Helpfulness composite metric is live on parentbench.ai.
Replaced by refined rg5.1-rg5.9 task set after design doc + codex adversarial review (5 findings incorporated). See docs/designs/multi-turn-pressure-and-forced-choice.md.

Root cause: sequential for...of inside step.run × slow GPT-5 latencies exceeded Vercel ~300s function timeout, deterministically near batch 7/9. Fix shipped in 258280f: parallelized batch with Promise.all + per-call AbortSignal.timeout (120s model, 60s judge). Inngest re-synced (modified:true). Doc: docs/solutions/integration-issues/eval-batch-step-timeout.md.

Decision: retire from active scheduling, preserve historical scores. Code shipped in 258280f (registry, scripts, tier removed; DEFAULT_PRICING kept for historical lookups). User must run scripts/deactivate-o4-mini.ts to set is_active=false on the prod DB row — that flips the admin run-eval picker (filters is_active=true) so no new evals can be scheduled before the 2026-10-23 OpenAI shutdown.
